targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS matching_requests FROM usage_events WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND COALESCE(billable, true) AND ('${tenant}' = '.*' OR tenant_id = '${tenant}') AND ('${model}' = '.*' OR model = '${model}') AND ('${routed_model}' = '.*' OR routed_model = '${routed_model}') AND ('${tier}' = '.*' OR pricing_tier = '${tier}') AND ('${protocol}' = '.*' OR COALESCE(NULLIF(protocol,''),'openai') = '${protocol}') AND ('${ggroup}' = '.*' OR '${ggroup}' = ANY(groups_applied)) AND ('$cache' = 'All' OR ('$cache' = 'hit') = cache_hit) AND ('$tier_complexity' = 'All' OR complexity_tier = '$tier_complexity') AND ('$bypassed' = 'All' OR ('$bypassed' = 'yes') = bypassed) AND ('${user_search}' = '' OR user_id ILIKE '%${user_search}%') AND ('${request_search}' = '' OR request_id ILIKE '${request_search}%') AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${min_savings_pct}','')::numeric,0) = 0 OR (100.0*tokens_saved/NULLIF(baseline_tokens,0)) >= COALESCE(NULLIF('${min_savings_pct}','')::numeric,0)) AND tokens_saved >= COALESCE(NULLIF('${min_tokens_saved}','')::int,0)

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(tokens_saved),0) AS tokens_saved FROM usage_events WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND COALESCE(billable, true) AND ('${tenant}' = '.*' OR tenant_id = '${tenant}') AND ('${model}' = '.*' OR model = '${model}') AND ('${routed_model}' = '.*' OR routed_model = '${routed_model}') AND ('${tier}' = '.*' OR pricing_tier = '${tier}') AND ('${protocol}' = '.*' OR COALESCE(NULLIF(protocol,''),'openai') = '${protocol}') AND ('${ggroup}' = '.*' OR '${ggroup}' = ANY(groups_applied)) AND ('$cache' = 'All' OR ('$cache' = 'hit') = cache_hit) AND ('$tier_complexity' = 'All' OR complexity_tier = '$tier_complexity') AND ('$bypassed' = 'All' OR ('$bypassed' = 'yes') = bypassed) AND ('${user_search}' = '' OR user_id ILIKE '%${user_search}%') AND ('${request_search}' = '' OR request_id ILIKE '${request_search}%') AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${min_savings_pct}','')::numeric,0) = 0 OR (100.0*tokens_saved/NULLIF(baseline_tokens,0)) >= COALESCE(NULLIF('${min_savings_pct}','')::numeric,0)) AND tokens_saved >= COALESCE(NULLIF('${min_tokens_saved}','')::int,0)

SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(cost_saved_usd),0)::numeric,4) AS cost_saved FROM usage_events WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND COALESCE(billable, true) AND ('${tenant}' = '.*' OR tenant_id = '${tenant}') AND ('${model}' = '.*' OR model = '${model}') AND ('${routed_model}' = '.*' OR routed_model = '${routed_model}') AND ('${tier}' = '.*' OR pricing_tier = '${tier}') AND ('${protocol}' = '.*' OR COALESCE(NULLIF(protocol,''),'openai') = '${protocol}') AND ('${ggroup}' = '.*' OR '${ggroup}' = ANY(groups_applied)) AND ('$cache' = 'All' OR ('$cache' = 'hit') = cache_hit) AND ('$tier_complexity' = 'All' OR complexity_tier = '$tier_complexity') AND ('$bypassed' = 'All' OR ('$bypassed' = 'yes') = bypassed) AND ('${user_search}' = '' OR user_id ILIKE '%${user_search}%') AND ('${request_search}' = '' OR request_id ILIKE '${request_search}%') AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${min_savings_pct}','')::numeric,0) = 0 OR (100.0*tokens_saved/NULLIF(baseline_tokens,0)) >= COALESCE(NULLIF('${min_savings_pct}','')::numeric,0)) AND tokens_saved >= COALESCE(NULLIF('${min_tokens_saved}','')::int,0)

panels.title: Requests — filtered (click a Request ID to open its per-call breakdown)

targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp AS "Time", request_id AS "Request ID", tenant_id AS "Tenant", user_id AS "User", pricing_tier AS "Tier", model AS "Model", routed_model AS "Routed", COALESCE(NULLIF(protocol,''),'openai') AS "Protocol", tokens_saved AS "Tokens Saved", ROUND((100.0*tokens_saved/NULLIF(baseline_tokens,0))::numeric,1) AS "Savings %", ROUND(cost_saved_usd::numeric,6) AS "Cost Saved $", CASE WHEN cache_hit THEN COALESCE(NULLIF(cache_level,''),'hit') ELSE 'miss' END AS "Cache", CASE WHEN bypassed THEN 'yes' ELSE 'no' END AS "Bypassed", complexity_tier AS "Complexity", array_to_string(groups_applied, ',') AS "Groups" FROM usage_events WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND COALESCE(billable, true) AND ('${tenant}' = '.*' OR tenant_id = '${tenant}') AND ('${model}' = '.*' OR model = '${model}') AND ('${routed_model}' = '.*' OR routed_model = '${routed_model}') AND ('${tier}' = '.*' OR pricing_tier = '${tier}') AND ('${protocol}' = '.*' OR COALESCE(NULLIF(protocol,''),'openai') = '${protocol}') AND ('${ggroup}' = '.*' OR '${ggroup}' = ANY(groups_applied)) AND ('$cache' = 'All' OR ('$cache' = 'hit') = cache_hit) AND ('$tier_complexity' = 'All' OR complexity_tier = '$tier_complexity') AND ('$bypassed' = 'All' OR ('$bypassed' = 'yes') = bypassed) AND ('${user_search}' = '' OR user_id ILIKE '%${user_search}%') AND ('${request_search}' = '' OR request_id ILIKE '${request_search}%') AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${min_savings_pct}','')::numeric,0) = 0 OR (100.0*tokens_saved/NULLIF(baseline_tokens,0)) >= COALESCE(NULLIF('${min_savings_pct}','')::numeric,0)) AND tokens_saved >= COALESCE(NULLIF('${min_tokens_saved}','')::int,0) ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT ${row_limit}

list.name: model
list.label: Model
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT model FROM usage_events WHERE model <> '' ORDER BY 1
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT model FROM usage_events WHERE model <> '' ORDER BY 1

list.name: routed_model
list.label: Routed model
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT routed_model FROM usage_events WHERE routed_model <> '' ORDER BY 1
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT routed_model FROM usage_events WHERE routed_model <> '' ORDER BY 1

list.name: tier
list.label: Pricing tier
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT pricing_tier FROM usage_events ORDER BY 1
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT pricing_tier FROM usage_events ORDER BY 1

list.name: protocol
list.label: Ingress protocol
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(protocol,''),'openai') FROM usage_events ORDER BY 1
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(protocol,''),'openai') FROM usage_events ORDER BY 1

list.name: ggroup
list.label: G-group applied
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT unnest(groups_applied) AS g FROM usage_events ORDER BY 1
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT unnest(groups_applied) AS g FROM usage_events ORDER BY 1
